qa.summary_desc: An overview of WIM UI's quality assurance, documentation, and test stability.
qa.summary_doc1_desc: The `Architecture/Standardization Overview` page has been created, enabling an overview of design philosophy and implementation rules in one place.
qa.summary_doc2_desc: Accessibility translation keys have been consolidated in `common.json`, enabling consistent aria-labels across the entire library.
qa.summary_fix1_desc: `react-i18next` is mocked globally in `test-setup.ts` with support for variable interpolation (`{{month}}`). Individual test files must not redefine the mock — use the shared setup.
qa.summary_fix2_desc: Use case-insensitive regular expressions for text queries (e.g., `/Close/i`). Prefer semantic queries (`getByRole`, `getByLabelText`) over `getByText` to make tests resilient to minor label changes.
qa.summary_fix3_desc: For components with animations or deferred state updates, use `waitFor` or `findBy*` queries. Always wait for DOM changes to settle before asserting.
qa.summary_fix4_desc: When a component's API changes (prop names, class names, rendered output), update the corresponding tests immediately to keep them in sync with the implementation.
qa.summary_section1_desc: WIM UI maintains unit tests for all components using Vitest and Testing Library. Tests follow a `describe/it` structure and are co-located with each component as `Component.test.tsx`.
qa.summary_section2_desc: The following tools have been introduced to maintain quality:
qa.summary_tool1_desc: `npm run test:coverage` visualizes code coverage (using v8).
qa.summary_tool2_desc: `npm run test:check` (`scripts/generate-missing-tests-report.cjs`) automatically detects components without test files.
qa.summary_tool3_desc: `npm run test:report` runs coverage measurement and automated checks together.
